title: Slovakian Fruit Pudding
description: A traditional Slovakian dessert featuring a yeasty and creamy texture, made with brown sugar and a variety of fruits, perfect for festive occasions. This plant-based-friendly version is just as delicious and authentic.

ingredients.name: mixed fruit
ingredients.notes: such as raisins, cranberries, and cherries

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, brown sugar, and yeast.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the non dairy milk, vanilla extract, and salt.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a smooth batter forms.
Fold in the mixed fruit and melted plant based butter.
Pour the batter into a 9x13 inch baking dish and let it simmer over low heat for 20 minutes.
Remove the dish from the heat and let it cool to room temperature.
Cover the dish with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Before serving, top the pudding with additional mixed fruit and a drizzle of plant based cream if desired.
